name: Crayola Crayons Bundle (3 Pack)
description: 3-Pack Crayola 24 Count Box of Crayons Non-Toxic Color Coloring School Supplies

reviews.name: Renee Jarrell
reviews.title: Great
reviews.body: I'm not really sure Crayola's really need a review.  They are the ONLY crayon that is worth purchasing.  All of the other crayons are far superior.  Their quality, size and color are all perfect.

reviews.name: Chrisitna
reviews.title: I love how easy it is to buy in bulk when you have multiple kids
reviews.body: It's Crayola The color of the crowns are gonna be great. The quality is there. I think what I loved most about this purchase was I was buying in bulk and the ease of having it delivered to my house very quickly. Perfect for Mom with multiple kids.

reviews.name: ED
reviews.title: Love these
reviews.body: Bought these for Easter gift bags. What can you say but Crayola is the best value and quality. The colors are rich and crayons are easy to hold in toddler hands  Kids love them

reviews.name: Frank C. Hughes
reviews.title: Crayons
reviews.body: Arrived on time.  Convient for 1-3 grade schoolers. and allows extra for teachers to share with students who can't afford new supplies.
